This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_equals: Incorrect behavior expected true but got false
[FAIL] Nested auto/hint ancestors, target is auto with fullscreen
  assert_equals: Incorrect behavior expected true but got false
[FAIL] Unrelated hint, target=auto with dialog
  assert_equals: Incorrect behavior expected true but got false
[FAIL] Unrelated hint, target=auto with fullscreen
  assert_equals: Incorrect behavior expected true but got false
